article_title: Bylaw 14753 — Housing Agreement (4612, 4664 Lougheed Highway and 2040, 2140 and 2150 Alpha Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Locks In Affordable Rental Units at Brentwood Development via Housing Agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council approved a legally binding housing agreement with Brentwood BT Development Limited, requiring a set number of below-market rental units at the Lougheed Highway and Alpha Avenue development. The agreement is registered on the property title, meaning the affordable rental rules stay with the land permanently.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage rental property in Burnaby, review whether similar inclusionary housing rules apply to your development plans.
